docs.title: Pricing
docs.summary: Loop is free for the first 5 teammates. After that, the Pro plan unlocks unlimited members, SSO, and audit logs.
docs.body:
# Pricing

Loop is free for the first 5 teammates. After that, our **Pro** plan unlocks unlimited members, SSO, and audit logs.

## What's included

- Unlimited tickets across all boards
- Unlimited integrations (GitHub, Linear, Notion)
- 30 days of activity history on Free, full history on Pro
- Email support on Free, Slack support on Pro

## How billing works

We bill monthly, per active member. An active member is anyone who logged in during the billing period. Cancel any time — you keep access until the end of the period.

docs.title: FAQ
docs.summary: How do I cancel? What happens to my data? Are exports supported? Answers to the common ones.
docs.body:
# FAQ

## How do I cancel?

You can cancel anytime from Settings → Billing. Your workspace stays active until the end of the current period.

## What happens to my data when I cancel?

Nothing. Your tickets, comments, and members stay in place. We freeze the workspace to read-only after 30 days, and delete it after 12 months of inactivity.

## Can I export my data?

Yes. Settings → Export gives you a JSON dump of every ticket, comment, and audit entry. The export is async — we email you a download link when it's ready.

## Do you support SSO?

SSO is available on the Pro plan. We support Google, Okta, and any SAML 2.0 IdP.

## Where is my data stored?

US-East by default. EU residency is available on the Pro plan.

steps.caption: Open any ticket from the board.
